name: akoya_request-intake-aggregates
_comment: Intake-portal slice 0. Only ONE net-new field on akoya_request: wmkf_totalothersources (cost-share total). The other slice-0 aggregates REUSE existing AkoyaGO fields (akoya_request = WMKF requested, akoya_expenses = total project cost, wmkf_numberofyearsoffunding = year count) — verified via live Dataverse probe 2026-05-14 (docs/INTAKE_PORTAL_SCHEMA_REVIEW_2026-05-14.md:9). akoya_request already participates in the currency model (it carries the existing akoya_request / akoya_expenses Money fields), so adding this Money attribute auto-creates wmkf_totalothersources_base and needs no extra currency wiring. Aggregate semantics: docs/BUDGET_FORM_SPEC.md:374 — sum of wmkf_proposalbudgetline.wmkf_amount filtered to cost-share categories (wmkf_category IN 100000006,100000007,100000008).

attributes.description: Cost-share total: sum of wmkf_proposalbudgetline.wmkf_amount across this request's cost-share lines (wmkf_category IN 100000006 WaivedIndirect / 100000007 WaivedTuition / 100000008 OtherCostShare). akoya_expenses = akoya_request + wmkf_totalothersources (BUDGET_FORM_SPEC.md:375). Maintained by the drain + the status-gated PA recompute (Item 6 A+B hybrid).
